evals.prompt:
I have a BRD for a new client project. Here's the content:

---
Business Requirements Document
Project: TaskFlow — Team Task Management Platform
Client: Meridian Consulting Group
Date: 2026-05-01

## Business Objective
Meridian needs an internal web platform to replace their current spreadsheet-based task tracking. Teams of 5-20 people need to create, assign, and track tasks across projects. The platform must integrate with their existing Slack workspace for notifications.

## Key Users
- Project Managers: create projects, assign tasks, view progress dashboards
- Team Members: view assigned tasks, update status, add comments
- Executives: read-only dashboard showing cross-project status

## Core Features Required
1. User authentication (email/password, SSO via Google)
2. Project creation and management
3. Task creation with title, description, assignee, due date, priority (Low/Medium/High/Critical)
4. Task status workflow: Backlog → In Progress → In Review → Done
5. Comments on tasks
6. File attachments on tasks (max 10MB per file)
7. Slack notifications when tasks are assigned or status changes
8. Dashboard showing tasks by status, overdue tasks, team workload
9. Email notifications as fallback when Slack is unavailable

## Non-Functional Requirements
- Web-only (no mobile app in v1)
- Must support 200 concurrent users
- Data stored in EU region (GDPR compliance)
- Response time under 2 seconds for all pages

## Out of Scope for v1
- Time tracking
- Billing/invoicing
- Public API
---

Please ingest this and create a full product spec and developer backlog.
evals.expected_output: spec/PRODUCT_SPEC.md with all required sections and REQ-IDs, spec/PRODUCT_SPEC.html as interactive file, spec/BACKLOG.md with epics/features/stories ordered for execution, spec/sources/manifest.json

evals.prompt:
We have multiple sources for a new project. Please ingest all of them and create the product spec and backlog.

SOURCE 1 — Initial BRD (brd-v1.md):
---
Project: MediTrack — Patient Appointment Booking System
Client: HealthFirst Clinics

Goal: Replace phone-based appointment booking with a self-service web portal.

Users:
- Patients: book, reschedule, cancel appointments online
- Clinic Staff: manage availability, view upcoming appointments, send reminders
- Clinic Admin: manage doctors, services, and clinic settings

Core requirements:
- Patient registration and login
- Browse available appointment slots by doctor and service type
- Book appointments with confirmation email
- Reschedule or cancel up to 24 hours before appointment
- Staff can block time slots and set availability
- Automated SMS reminders 24 hours before appointment
- Admin panel for managing doctors and services
---

SOURCE 2 — Follow-up meeting transcript (meeting-2026-05-10.txt):
---
Client: We forgot to mention — patients need to fill out a pre-visit intake form when they book. It's a simple questionnaire, maybe 5-10 questions.
Dev Lead: Got it. Any specific questions or is it configurable?
Client: It should be configurable by the clinic admin. Different services might have different forms.
Client: Also, we need to support multiple clinic locations. Each location has its own doctors and availability.
Dev Lead: So a patient books at a specific location?
Client: Yes, exactly. And one more thing — we said SMS reminders but actually we want both SMS and email reminders. The patient can choose their preference.
Dev Lead: What about the 200 concurrent users limit from the BRD?
Client: Actually that was wrong — we expect up to 500 concurrent users at peak.
---

SOURCE 3 — Slack message from product owner (slack-export.txt):
---
Quick note from the PO: patients should be able to see their appointment history. Also the mobile experience is important — not a native app but the web app must be fully responsive and work well on phones. The BRD said web-only but that was referring to no native app, not no mobile support.
---

Please reconcile any contradictions and create the full spec and backlog.
evals.expected_output: spec/PRODUCT_SPEC.md reconciling all 3 sources with contradictions flagged in Open Questions (concurrent users discrepancy), spec/PRODUCT_SPEC.html, spec/BACKLOG.md with stories for all features including intake forms and multi-location, spec/sources/manifest.json with 3 sources

evals.prompt:
We already have a spec and backlog for the TaskFlow project. A new meeting happened and the client added requirements. Please update the existing spec and backlog incrementally — don't rewrite from scratch.

Existing spec summary: TaskFlow task management platform with REQ-001 through REQ-020 covering auth, projects, tasks, comments, attachments, Slack integration, and dashboards.

New requirements from client meeting (2026-05-15):
1. Recurring tasks — tasks can be set to repeat daily, weekly, or monthly
2. Task templates — project managers can save task configurations as reusable templates
3. The client decided to drop file attachments (was REQ-008) — too complex for v1, will revisit in v2
4. Time estimates — tasks should have an optional estimated hours field
5. The Slack integration (REQ-015) now also needs to support Microsoft Teams as an alternative

Please update PRODUCT_SPEC.md (preserve all existing REQ-IDs, add new ones, mark removed ones), update PRODUCT_SPEC.html, update BACKLOG.md (add new stories, mark removed ones), and add a changelog entry.
evals.expected_output: Updated spec/PRODUCT_SPEC.md with new REQ-IDs for new requirements, REQ-008 marked as REMOVED, changelog entry added, existing REQ-IDs preserved. Updated BACKLOG.md with new stories for recurring tasks/templates/time estimates, file attachment stories marked REMOVED. Updated HTML. manifest.json updated.
